---
name: 🎮 Scene Setup
about: Use this template to request or document work on new or existing Godot scenes.
title: "[Scene] ..."
labels: ['🎮 scene']
assignees: ''
---

## 🧩 Scene Summary

> _Describe the scene being created or modified._  
> _E.g., “Main Menu with animated buttons” or “Level 1 with terrain + enemies”_

## 🎯 Purpose

> _Why is this scene needed in the game flow? Where will it be used?_

## 🧱 Nodes to Include

- [ ] Root node: `Node2D` / `Control` / `Other: ___`
- [ ] Expected children (List with names + types):
  - `Camera2D`
  - `PlayerSpawn`
  - `StartButton`

## 🎭 Signals & Interaction

> _Will this scene emit or listen to any signals?_  
> _Does it rely on global singleton data?_  
> _How should interaction work (e.g. buttons, keyboard)?_

## 📂 Suggested File Location

> E.g. `Scenes/MainMenu/` or `Scenes/Levels/Level01.tscn`

## 📎 Related

> _Mention any scripts, assets, or issues tied to this scene._
